answers: Popular martial arts: Karate, Judo, Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu, Taekwondo, Muay Thai, Boxing, Kung Fu, Aikido.
For self-defense: BJJ and Muay Thai are highly effective. For discipline: Karate and Taekwondo. For fitness: any!
Benefits: fitness, self-defense, confidence, discipline, stress relief, and community. Great for all ages.
Start: try a free class at local dojos/gyms, find a style you enjoy, and commit to training 2-3 times per week.
